headline: Will Ralph Lauren's Next Great Chapter Plan & Digital Push Aid?
summary: RL is driving growth through digital expansion, personalization and its Next Great Chapter strategy while strengthening its global brand presence.

raw.headline: Will Ralph Lauren's Next Great Chapter Plan & Digital Push Aid?
raw.summary: RL is driving growth through digital expansion, personalization and its Next Great Chapter strategy while strengthening its global brand presence.

headline: Retail REIT CEO Says Consumer Traffic and Demand Have Strengthened Since the Start of 2026
summary: Stephen Yalof, CEO of Tanger (NYSE:SKT), a retail REIT that owns and operates outlet shopping centers across the U.S., delivered an on-the-ground read of the U.S. shopper on a recent CNBC appearance, telling viewers that consumers have kept coming back to Tanger’s shopping centers since the beginning of the year. headline: Tanger Outlets CEO on the state of retail and the consumer
summary: Tanger Outlets CEO Stephen Yalof says despite headwinds from inflation and other macro issues, consumers have continued to show up at stores since the start of the year.

raw.headline: Tanger Outlets CEO on the state of retail and the consumer
